name: Pantoprazole
executiveSummary: IV/PO PPI for stress ulcer prophylaxis and upper gastrointestinal bleeding.
indications:
## Indications

- Stress ulcer prophylaxis in the ICU.
- Upper gastrointestinal bleeding in IV PPI regimens.

## Precautions

- Interactions with clopidogrel (lesser than omeprazole).
- Prolonged hypomagnesemia.

> Adjust according to institutional protocols and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 40–80 mg IV every 24 h as infusion or bolus.

stability:
## Stability

- Reconstitute and use according to IV package insert.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. ACLS / PALS / NRP Guidelines.
ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Society of Critical Care Medicine (SCCM). ICU medication guidelines.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
